search.query: index=teachua_infra | stats count latest(_time) as last_seen by sourcetype | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
index=teachua_infra cpu_used_pct=* | timechart avg(cpu_used_pct) as "CPU used %" avg(cpu_iowait_pct) as "IO wait %"
index=teachua_infra mem_used_pct=* | timechart avg(mem_used_pct) as "Memory used %"
index=teachua_infra used_pct=* mount=* | timechart avg(used_pct) by mount
index=teachua_infra used_pct=* mount=* | stats latest(used_pct) as "Used %" latest(avail_bytes) as "Available bytes" by filesystem, mount

index=teachua_infra rx_bytes_per_sec=* interface=* | search NOT interface IN (tunl0, gre0, gretap0, erspan0, ip_vti0, ip6_vti0, sit0, ip6tnl0, ip6gre0) | timechart avg(rx_bytes_per_sec) as rx avg(tx_bytes_per_sec) as tx by interface

index=teachua_infra rx_bytes_per_sec=* interface=* | search NOT interface IN (tunl0, gre0, gretap0, erspan0, ip_vti0, ip6_vti0, sit0, ip6tnl0, ip6gre0) | stats latest(rx_bytes_per_sec) as "RX bytes/sec" latest(tx_bytes_per_sec) as "TX bytes/sec" by interface | sort - "RX bytes/sec"
